description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced, landscaped yard featuring a driveway, multiple trees, and manicured lawns. The main building has a steep gable roof with gray shingles, large windows, and a wooden front porch. The property includes a detached garage or shed, paved walkways, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The front yard is lined with evenly spaced trees and a stone path leading to the entrance. The backyard features a small pool or water feature, additional greenery, and a private sitting area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open green spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, gable-roofed bungalow with large windows, a wooden porch, and landscaped gardens within a fenced property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden porch, driveway, and a car parked near a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep gable roof, detached shed, and a row of trees along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a pool or water feature, patio, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: Alternate side view showing the driveway, two parked cars, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on front and side facades
